compiled_state.title: Add 50-randomized-input JSON byte-exact test for write_commit_event
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Task
In tests/scripts/test-ticket-write-commit-event.sh, add test_write_commit_event_json_byte_exact_randomized that generates 50 random title strings (include quotes, backslashes, newlines, unicode) and for each: (1) creates a temp JSON via write_commit_event callers, (2) reads the committed event file, (3) compares md5 against python3 json.dumps(ensure_ascii=False, separators=(',',':'), sort_keys=True) output. Testing mode: GREEN.

## Story
